text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I walk down the hall, I run into Inari One, who
seems to be on her way somewhere with a plastic
bag in hand.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey Boss, fancy meetin' you here! This? Just some
ingredients for lunch. I'm headin' to the home ec
room to whip somethin' up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey Boss, fancy meetin' you here! This? Just some
ingredients for lunch. I'm headin' to the home ec
room to whip somethin' up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, I've put on some weight lately... I tried
eatin' low-carb soba, but man, talk about bland!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: That's when I had an idea. I'll just make it myself!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'll burn calories poundin' the dough while makin' the soba as tasty as I want! I call it the killin'-two-birds-with-one-stone diet!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: How 'bout it? Wanna try some too, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: How 'bout it? Wanna try some too, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One continues her soba dough-pounding
diet and successfully returns to her original
weight.
